news.title:

Kaynes Tech sees interest on rising demand expectations from higher temperatures.
news.summary:

news.title:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.
news.summary:
FPIs increased stakes in 13 midcap stocks like AWL, Bank of Maharashtra, Hitachi Energy steadily over four quarters.
Notable large caps Bharti Airtel, TVS Motor, and small caps Indegene, Authum saw significant FPI inflows amid cautious market sentiment.

news.title:
Hitachi Energy India to hold analyst/investor meetings on Feb 17, 2026.
Meetings include Nuvama and HSBC, with face-to-face and virtual modes.
news.summary:
Hitachi Energy India to hold analyst/investor meetings on Feb 17, 2026.
Meetings include Nuvama and HSBC, with face-to-face and virtual modes.

news.title:
Hitachi Energy India Ltd reported strong Q3 FY26 results with 73% YoY growth in base orders (excluding HVDC), revenue up 29.6% to Rs. 2,168 crore, and PBT before exceptional items rising 118% to Rs. 402 crore.
The company highlighted significant opportunities in data centers, renewable energy, and HVDC projects, with exports contributing 29-30% of revenue. CAPEX plans of Rs. 700+ crore for FY26 remain on track.
news.summary:
Hitachi Energy India Ltd reported strong Q3 FY26 results with 73% YoY growth in base orders (excluding HVDC), revenue up 29.6% to Rs. 2,168 crore, and PBT before exceptional items rising 118% to Rs. 402 crore.
The company highlighted significant opportunities in data centers, renewable energy, and HVDC projects, with exports contributing 29-30% of revenue. CAPEX plans of Rs. 700+ crore for FY26 remain on track.

news.title:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.

news.title:
Hitachi Energy's net profit surged 90.5% YoY, driving shares up 14%.
NSE advance-decline ratio was at 2:3.
news.summary:
Hitachi Energy's net profit surged 90.5% YoY, driving shares up 14%.
NSE advance-decline ratio was at 2:3.

news.title:

The total trade value amounted to Rs. 20.5 crores.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.
news.summary:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.

news.title:
India's power demand is surging, driven by AC expansion, AI data centers, and industrial growth. Power Grid reports 7% revenue growth in Q3FY26, revising FY26 capex to ₹32,000 crore.
Tata Power emphasizes renewables, with 66-70% green capacity by 2030. Hitachi Energy sees export growth, driven by HVDC, data centers, and high-speed rail projects, with a ₹7B capex plan for FY26-27.
news.summary:
India's power demand is surging, driven by AC expansion, AI data centers, and industrial growth. Power Grid reports 7% revenue growth in Q3FY26, revising FY26 capex to ₹32,000 crore.
Tata Power emphasizes renewables, with 66-70% green capacity by 2030. Hitachi Energy sees export growth, driven by HVDC, data centers, and high-speed rail projects, with a ₹7B capex plan for FY26-27.

news.title:
Hitachi Energy India Ltd reported a 29.6% YoY revenue growth for Q3FY26, reaching INR 2,168 crore.
PAT surged 90.3% YoY to INR 261.4 crore, with a robust order backlog of INR 29,872.2 crore.
news.summary:
Hitachi Energy India Ltd reported a 29.6% YoY revenue growth for Q3FY26, reaching INR 2,168 crore.
PAT surged 90.3% YoY to INR 261.4 crore, with a robust order backlog of INR 29,872.2 crore.

news.title:
Hitachi Energy commits ₹2,000 crore for India expansion, focusing on AI-driven energy needs.
The company achieved renewable power sourcing goals early and urges long-term planning for growth.
news.summary:
Hitachi Energy commits ₹2,000 crore for India expansion, focusing on AI-driven energy needs.
The company achieved renewable power sourcing goals early and urges long-term planning for growth.

news.title:
Hitachi Energy India faces a tax demand for AY 2022-23 totaling Rs.260.7 crores.
The company deems the demand arbitrary and plans to appeal with ITAT by Jan 23, 2026.
news.summary:
Hitachi Energy India faces a tax demand for AY 2022-23 totaling Rs.260.7 crores.
The company deems the demand arbitrary and plans to appeal with ITAT by Jan 23, 2026.

news.title:
Hitachi Energy India Ltd's board meeting on Feb 5, 2026, will review Q3 FY26 results.
An investor/analyst call is scheduled on Feb 5, 2026, from 17:00-18:00 IST to discuss the results.
news.summary:

news.title:

The stock ended a 6-day losing streak, outperforming its sector by 4.4%.
news.summary:

news.title:
India's T&D sector sees growth with a Rs 2.4 lakh crore capex plan by FY30, supporting 500 GW renewable energy goals.
Stocks like Hitachi Energy and KEC International benefit from rising order books, global demand, and strong execution in this sector.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hitachi Energy India faces INR 3.15 crore duty and penalties by Customs.
An additional INR 3 crore fine imposed; company to challenge the order legally.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hitachi Energy India received a GST order from UP authorities for FY 2021-22 citing tax, interest, and penalty demands.
The company disputes the Rs. 9.02 crore tax demand and Rs. 90.2 lakh penalty as unjustified, planning to appeal.
news.summary:
Hitachi Energy India received a GST order from UP authorities for FY 2021-22 citing tax, interest, and penalty demands.
The company disputes the Rs. 9.02 crore tax demand and Rs. 90.2 lakh penalty as unjustified, planning to appeal.
